home-hero-proof-copy.text: is the accumulation of algae, barnacles, and other micro-organisms onto ship hulls.

home-why-copy.text: Biofouling is more than a maintenance issue. It increases fuel use, emissions, coating wear, and environmental risk. Subvision is building a prevention-first approach that helps operators stay ahead of growth early and reduce the need for heavier intervention later.

home-why-title.text: Biofouling Prevention can Save $1M per Year per Ship

home-issues-support-title.text:
Lower drag.   
Less coatings pressure. 
Reduced invasive transfer risk.
